summary: Complete frontend testing of Melus AI HomePage features. All requested elements verified functional: agent mode selectors (E1/E2), Ultra Mode toggle, model dropdown with all AI models, settings panel, file attachment button, microphone button, expand/collapse button, suggestion buttons, and submit (Crear App) button. Route /generator correctly redirects to /home (hidden route).

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - related to Emergent visual editor wrapper wrapping table rows. Does not affect functionality but appears in console.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing user account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All HomePage features verified working. Tests executed with data-testid selectors.

features_tested./generator_route_hidden: PASS - Route redirects to /login (protected) then to /home when authenticated
features_tested.agent_mode_e1: PASS - data-testid='agent-mode-e1' found, clickable, changes state
features_tested.agent_mode_e2: PASS - data-testid='agent-mode-e2' found, clickable, shows 'Avanzado' label, active styling applied
features_tested.ultra_mode_toggle: PASS - data-testid='ultra-mode-toggle' found, clickable, shows toast 'Ultra Mode activado - 2x créditos, máxima calidad'
features_tested.model_selector_dropdown: PASS - data-testid='model-selector-btn' found, opens dropdown with all 4 models: GPT-4o, Claude 4.5 Opus, Claude 4.5 Sonnet, Gemini 3 Pro
features_tested.settings_button: PASS - data-testid='settings-btn' found, opens settings panel with Temperatura slider and Max Tokens input
features_tested.file_attach_button: PASS - data-testid='file-attach-btn' (paperclip icon) found and clickable, triggers file input
features_tested.microphone_button: PASS - data-testid='mic-btn' found with SVG icon, ready for voice input
features_tested.expand_collapse_button: PASS - data-testid='expand-collapse-btn' found, toggles visibility of 'Tareas recientes' projects section
features_tested.suggestion_buttons: PASS - All 4 suggestions found: MeltBot, Registrador de ideas, Delicias horneadas, Sorpréndeme. Clicking fills textarea with predefined prompts
features_tested.submit_button: PASS - data-testid='submit-btn' disabled when empty, enabled when text entered, navigates to /workspace with params

ui_elements_verified.agent_buttons: E1 and E2 selectors with active state styling (cyan gradient)
ui_elements_verified.ultra_mode: Toggle with Zap icon, shows toast feedback
ui_elements_verified.model_dropdown: Shows Brain icon, dropdown with 4 AI model options with icons and descriptions
ui_elements_verified.settings_panel: Collapsible panel with Temperatura slider, Max Tokens input, checkbox
ui_elements_verified.submit_button: Gradient purple-pink 'Crear App' button with Sparkles icon

navigation_verified.generator_redirect: PASS - /generator redirects to /home (route removed as requested)
navigation_verified.submit_to_workspace: PASS - Submit navigates to /workspace?prompt=... with model, mode, ultra params
